challenges.prompt: Watch or perform family-friendly comedy with friends for 30 minutes while trying not to laugh; breathing, blinking, breaks, and quitting are always allowed. Short-form twist: keep the final clip under 30 seconds and make the joke visible without targeting anyone else.
